en.extract:
The West African seedeater (Crithagra canicapilla) is a small passerine bird in the finch family. It is found in Guinea, Sierra Leone, southern Mali and northern Ivory Coast across to southern Niger and northern Cameroon, with a disjunct population in South Sudan, Uganda and neighboring areas.
Some authorities have considered the West African seedeater as a subspecies of the streaky-headed seedeater (Crithagra gularis).
Three subspecies are recognised:

C. c. canicapilla (Du Bus de Gisignies, 1855)
C. c. elgonensis (Ogilvie-Grant, 1912)
C. c. montanorum (Bannerman, 1923)

The '''West African seedeater''' ('''''Crithagra canicapilla''''') is a small [[passerine]] bird in the [[finch]] [[family (taxonomy)|family]]. It is found in Guinea, Sierra Leone, southern Mali and northern Ivory Coast across to southern Niger and northern Cameroon, with a disjunct population in South Sudan, Uganda and neighboring areas.

Some authorities have considered the West African seedeater as a [[subspecies]] of the [[streaky-headed seedeater]] (''Crithagra gularis'').<ref>{{ cite web | last1=Clements | first1=J.F. | last2=Schulenberg | first2=T.S. | last3=Iliff | first3=M.J. | last4=Roberson | first4=D. | last5=Fredericks | first5=T.A. | last6=Sullivan | first6=B.L. | last7=Wood | first7=C.L. | year=2014 | title=The eBird/Clements checklist of birds of the world: Version 6.9 | url=https://www.birds.cornell.edu/clementschecklist/download/ | access-date=13 July 2015}}</ref><ref name=hbw>{{cite book| last1=del Hoyo | first1=J. | last2=Collar | first2=N. | chapter=West African Seedeater (''Crithagra canicapilla'') | editor1-last=del Hoyo | editor1-first=J | editor2-last=Elliott | editor2-first=A. | editor3-last=Sargatal | editor3-first=J. | editor4-last=Christie | editor4-first=D.A. | editor5-last=de Juana | editor5-first=E. | title=Handbook of the Birds of the World Alive | publisher=Lynx Edicions | chapter-url= http://www.hbw.com/node/1344133 | access-date=6 May 2017}}{{subscription required}}</ref>

Three subspecies are recognised:<ref name=ioc>{{cite web| editor1-last=Gill | editor1-first=Frank | editor2-last=Donsker | editor2-first=David | title=Finches, euphonias | work= World Bird List Version 5.2| url=http://www.worldbirdnames.org/bow/finches/ | publisher=International Ornithologists' Union| access-date=5 June 2015 }}</ref>
* ''C. c. canicapilla'' <small>([[Bernard du Bus de Gisignies|Du Bus de Gisignies]], 1855)</small>
* ''C. c. elgonensis'' <small>([[William Robert Ogilvie-Grant|Ogilvie-Grant]], 1912)</small>
* ''C. c. montanorum'' <small>([[David Armitage Bannerman|Bannerman]], 1923)</small>
